About.heading: About
About.para1: Hi, I'm Andrew, an English & French speaking web developer based near Civray, Vienne (86), in South West France. I serve businesses across the local area — Charroux, Ruffec, Poitiers, Angoulême, Limoges and throughout Nouvelle-Aquitaine — as well as clients in Greater Manchester and Tameside, UK. If you're looking for web design, site modernisation, online shops or IT support, you've come to the right place.
About.para2: I'm also available for specialist freelance contracts — if you're an agency, startup or larger organisation looking for a full-stack developer working with modern JavaScript frameworks, Next.js, Vite or Go, get in touch. Please contact me using the form below or through my social media — links in the header.

Portfolio.gardapis: A full e-commerce store for a French beekeeping products brand. Built on a custom server with a product admin dashboard, the storefront supports 6 languages, bulk discount pricing, product options, verified customer reviews, and PayPal checkout — all hosted on a dedicated server for around €13 per month.
Portfolio.sage: A welcoming website for a language school in South West France offering English and French courses. Fully bilingual so visitors can browse in either language, with easy-to-use contact forms and everything in place to rank well on Google search results.
Portfolio.tc: A portfolio site for Terry Carroll, a photographer based in Bristol, UK. Features six themed galleries with a masonry layout and lightbox viewer, all images hosted and optimised via Cloudinary. An admin dashboard lets Terry upload new photos directly without touching any code.
Portfolio.carpetco: Professional carpet fitting service in Dukinfield and Greater Manchester. Modern, responsive website built with Next.js 16, featuring service showcases, contact forms, and SEO optimization. Clean design focused on conversion and easy navigation for local customers.
Portfolio.nd: Nature Dopes is an ongoing project dedicated to creating a site firstly for the appreciation of natural flora, secondly as an educational tool. To preserve the environment, we first need to understand it. It's a full stack application developed in NextJs 14 Typescipt, It utilizes many of the latest NextJs tools, such as Next-auth for authentification, Next-intl for multi language, Radix Ui, Iagon for decentralized storage and Prisma for Database management. Follow the link to view
Portfolio.pop: This is the homepage page for a new startup business offering childcare options for weddings and large events, please give them a look if you have any major events planned in South West France. The site is a web application developed in NextJs 14 and uses Next-Int for intuitive language switching. Follow the link to view
Portfolio.pocket: This is a complete site redesign for an upcoming Web 3 gaming and NFT project called Pocket Towne. Developed in HTML, CSS , Javascript. Please check them out if you're interested in Metaverse & web 3
Portfolio.space: S.P.A.C.E is an NFT Art/ Utility project. I've developed a landing page to serve as the homepage for the project. The site has been developed using NextJs, using React hooks & components to give the site a responsive and animated feel.
